title: eria dujakorum
intro: Eria dujakorum, also known as the Dujakorum orchid, is a flowering plant species endemic to the Western Ghats in India. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that grows on tree trunks and branches, and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian medicine. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are beneficial for treating various health issues, including wounds, fever, and digestive problems. Eria dujakorum can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat a range of health conditions and promote overall well-being.
